criteria.reason: `src/App.tsx` keeps `data-testid="active-session-label"` as the inline session-name input with no `Session:` prefix, and the targeted Playwright run passed.

Inline rename trims input, rejects blank-only names, updates local state, and persists through `window.bigIDE.sessions.rename` in both the web and Electron backends without touching session ids or workdir paths; the rename Playwright flow passed.
The header chips render in a single nowrap flex row with overflow clipping, per-chip `title` attributes, and truncated inner spans.
Start, Stop, and New Panel render in one `overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap` action row and each button is `shrink-0`, preventing wrap.
Start, Stop, and New Panel all use the same outline/small/rounded-none button treatment while keeping their existing icons, labels, disabled behavior, and test ids.

`Ctrl+Alt+T` opens the add-panel dialog, focus is forced to the first option on open, arrow-key navigation is implemented, native button semantics cover Tab and Enter/Space, and the targeted Playwright shortcut flow passed.
`new-panel-button` and `new-panel-option-<kind>` remain in place and the click-to-add flow still passes in Playwright.
The editor panel and shell now preserve full-height flex sizing, Monaco still binds file models and save callbacks, and the file-open/editor-visibility Playwright flow passed.
The browser address row is rendered through `PanelShell.headerContent`, which suppresses the redundant title block, and the browser navigation/iframe Playwright flow passed.

commands_run.details: Verified current workspace contents before rerun.

commands_run.command: npm run test:e2e -- --grep "session rename and Ctrl\+Alt\+T panel shortcut work|files open one-editor-per-file and git/browser panels stay usable|panel drag reorder still works after resize and horizontal scroll"
